scientific_answer_battery.intent: Evaluate whether an agent can plan and execute small comparative MD studies, extract quantitative evidence, and answer a scientific question with calibrated confidence. The battery spans loss-of-function (destabilizing, weakened binding), gain-of-function (stabilizing), and ligand-affinity directions so a constant prior cannot win.

notes: Study-level suite in the MDAgentBench benchmark family.
Tasks focus on scientific question answering and auditable study bundles, not system preparation alone.
Preparation-only workflow tasks live in MDPrepBench.
